description_long: This object is a large, rectangular wall installation featuring three distinct mosaic artworks side by side. Each mosaic is vibrant and highly detailed, with the left panel depicting stylized faces in a symmetrical arrangement, the center panel showing a colorful abstract face with hands, and the right panel illustrating a dynamic female figure with flowing hair. The mosaics are composed of small, colored tiles arranged to create intricate patterns and vivid imagery. The surface is flat and hard, with a slight texture from the individual tiles. The structure appears to be a decorative facade or mural wall, likely serving as a focal point for an arts center in an urban environment. The overall impression is one of creativity and public engagement, inviting viewers to appreciate the artistry up close.
description: A large, rectangular wall installation with three vibrant mosaic artworks, each featuring unique and colorful imagery. The surface is composed of small, textured tiles arranged in detailed patterns.
description_view_0: The front view displays all three mosaic panels clearly, showcasing the full detail and color of each artwork.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the extreme thinness of the wall, with almost no visible detail except the edge of the panels.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing the three mosaic artworks in reverse order, with all details visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows only the thin edge of the wall, with no artwork visible.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is a striking mosaic mural composed of small, colored ceramic tiles arranged in three distinct panels, each with unique artistic motifs. The design is highly ornamental, with bold colors and intricate patterns, reflecting a contemporary public art style. The surface is textured due to the tile arrangement, and the overall composition is symmetrical in layout but varied in artistic content.
attribute_public_art_installations: Three large mosaic murals are integrated into the wall, each serving as a public art installation. The left panel features stylized faces, the center panel displays an abstract face with hands, and the right panel depicts a dynamic female figure. All are constructed from colored ceramic tiles in a vibrant, expressive style.
